headline: A Look At Packaging Corporation Of America (PKG) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Performance
summary: What Packaging Corporation of America’s recent performance tells investors Packaging Corporation of America (PKG) has drawn investor attention after a period of mixed share performance, with the stock down 0.8% over the past month but roughly flat over the past 3 months. Across longer periods, the stock shows a 5.5% gain year to date and a 16.2% total return over the past year, while its 3 year and 5 year total returns are very large at roughly 8x and 7x respectively. See our latest analysis...
